name: Citrus Trout Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lemon in half and rub the trout with the cut side.
2. Sprinkle salt and pepper on both sides of the trout.
3. Place the onion slices at the bottom of a casserole dish.
4. Put the trout on top of the onion.
5. Arrange orange sections around the trout.
6. Squeeze the juice from the lemon and orange onto the trout.
7. Pour the white wine into the casserole dish.
8. Cover with aluminum foil.
9. Bake at 450°F for 25 to 30 minutes, then turn off the heat.
